summary_text: ### 修正対象 [script/fugue-execute.mjs](/Users/masayuki/.claude/skills/orchestra-delegator/scripts/fugue-execute.mjs) 前提: `~/.claude/state/runs/<run-id>/state.json` を正として `--list` / `--clean` を追加しつつ、既存互換のため `~/.claude/state/runs/*.json` も一覧対象に含めました。`--clean` は指示どおりディレクトリ型 run のみ削除します。 ### 修正内容（diff形式） ```diff @@ -import { appendFileSync, existsSync, mkdirSync, readFileSync, renameSync, writeFileSync } from "node:fs"; +import { appendFileSync, existsSync, mkdirSync, readFileSync, readdirSync, renameSync, rmSync, writeFileSync } from "node:fs"; @@ node fugue-execute.mjs --resume <run-id> node fugue-execute.mjs --status <run-id> + node fugue-execute.mjs --list + node fugue-execute.mjs --clean node fugue-execute.mjs --smoke`); @@ - const parsed = { task: "", project: "", tier: "auto", resume: "", status: "", smoke: false }; + const parsed = { task: "", project: "", tier: "auto", resume: "", status: "", list: false, clean: false, smoke: false }; @@ + } else if (arg === "--list") { + parsed.list = true; + } else if (arg === "--clean") { + parsed.clean = true; } else if (arg === "--smoke") { parsed.smoke = true; @@ function statePath(id) { return path.join(RUN_DIR, `${id}.json`); } + +function listRunEntries() { + return readdirSync(RUN_DIR, { withFileTypes: true }).flatMap((entry) => { + const runPath = entry.isDirectory() ? path.join(RUN_DIR, entry.name, "state.json") : path.join(RUN_DIR, entry.name); + if (!existsSync(runPath) || (!entry.isDirectory() && !entry.name.endsWith(".json"))) return []; + const state = readJson(runPath); + if (!state) return []; + return [{ state, runPath, isDirectory: entry.isDirectory(), runId: state.runId || entry.name.replace(/\.json$/, "") }]; + }); +} + +function compactTask(task, max = 50) { + const text = String(task || "").replace(/\s+/g, " ").trim(); + return text.length <= max ? text : `${text.slice(0, max - 3)}...`; +} + +function timestampOf(value) { + const time = value ? Date.parse(value) : 0; + return Number.isNaN(time) ? 0 : time; +} + +function printRunList() { + const widths = [12, 16, 6, 50, 24]; + const rows = listRunEntries() + .sort((a, b) => timestampOf(b.state.updatedAt) - timestampOf(a.state.updatedAt)) + .map(({ state, runId }) => [runId, state.phase || "", String(state.tier ?? ""), compactTask(state.task), state.updatedAt || ""]); + console.log(["run-id", "phase", "tier", "task", "updated"].map((value, i) => value.padEnd(widths[i])).join(" | ")); + for (const row of rows) console.log(row.map((value, i) => String(value).padEnd(widths[i])).join(" | ")); +} + +function cleanRuns() { + const cutoff = Date.now() - (7 * 24 * 60 * 60 * 1000); + const deleted = []; + for (const entry of listRunEntries()) { + const updated = timestampOf(entry.state.updatedAt || entry.state.createdAt); + if (!entry.isDirectory() || entry.state.phase !== "done" || !updated || updated > cutoff) continue; + rmSync(path.dirname(entry.runPath), { recursive: true, force: true }); + deleted.push(entry.runId); + } + console.log(deleted.length ? deleted.join("\n") : "No runs cleaned."); +} @@ try { const args = parseArgs(process.argv.slice(2)); + if (args.list) { + printRunList(); + return; + } + if (args.clean) { + cleanRuns(); + return; + } if (args.smoke) { ``` ### 検証結果 `node --check /Users/masayuki/.claude/skills/orchestra-delegator/scripts/fugue-execute.mjs` は成功しました。 `node /Users/masayuki/.claude/skills/orchestra-delegator/scripts/fugue-execute.mjs --list` でヘッダ付きの一覧出力を確認しました。 `--clean` は実行していません。削除処理を伴うため、今回はコード追加のみです。
